mapper.sql: id, addr_start, addr_end, travel_vehicle, travel_fee, category, hosp_code, is_valid
mapper.select: select cfrcv.id as rowId,cfrcv.addr_start as addrStart,cfrcv.addr_end as addrEnd,cfrcv.travel_vehicle as travelVehicle,cftv.name as travelVehicleName, cfrcv.travel_fee as travelFee, category,cfrcv.hosp_code as hospCode,csh.name , cfrcv.is_valid as isValid from cf_fund_rmbs_config_vehicle cfrcv left join ct_fund_travel_vehicle cftv on cfrcv.travel_vehicle =cftv.code left join ct_srm_hospital csh on cfrcv.hosp_code=csh.code
